tasks.title: Make Windows PTY Limitation More Prominent
tasks.description: Windows PTY limitation is documented but not prominent enough for Windows users. Need to add compile-time warnings, runtime warnings, and clear documentation about Windows best-effort status.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify #[cfg(windows)] compile-time warning is present at module level
AddUnitTest: verify runtime warning is emitted when PTY operations attempted on Windows
AddRegressionTest: ensure Unix PTY functionality continues to work without warnings
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing to verify all existing tests pass
tasks.impl_notes: Use tracing::warn! for runtime warnings on Windows. Ensure #[cfg(windows)] doc comments are prominent at module entry.

tasks.title: Update PRD File Structure Documentation
tasks.description: PRD shows 6 test files but 8 exist (dialog_tests, dsl_integration_tests, snapshot_tests are enhancements). Need to update spec_v32.md to reflect actual 8-file structure.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify spec_v32.md contains all 8 test files documented
AddUnitTest: verify extra test files are noted as enhancements beyond PRD
tasks.impl_notes: Update File Structure section in spec to list all 8 test files. Add note explaining extra files are enhancements.

tasks.title: Document DialogRenderTester Extension
tasks.description: DialogRenderTester module exists but is not in the original PRD. Need to add FR-DIALOG-001 section to spec and update Module Status table.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify DialogRenderTester is exported in lib.rs
AddUnitTest: verify DialogRenderTester has proper doc comments
tasks.impl_notes: Add FR-DIALOG-001 section to spec with DialogRenderTester details. Update Module Status table.

tasks.title: Review Global unwrap_used Allowance
tasks.description: #![allow(clippy::unwrap_used)] globally permits unwrap usage throughout the crate. Need to audit all unwrap usages and replace with proper error handling where feasible.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -W clippy::unwrap_used shows no new unwrap usages
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing passes after refactoring
AddUnitTest: verify error handling is properly implemented for previously unwrap'd code paths
tasks.impl_notes: Audit all unwrap usages, replace with proper error handling (Result/Option with ? operator or unwrap_or/unwrap_or_else). Move allowance to specific modules if needed with explanatory comments.

tasks.title: Simplify Windows PTY Stub
tasks.description: 105 lines of stub code for Windows could be simplified with macros to reduce boilerplate while ensuring consistent, helpful error messages.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify Windows stub still returns helpful error messages
AddUnitTest: verify reduced line count with maintained functionality
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing passes on Unix
tasks.impl_notes: Review current Windows stub implementation. Create macro or helper to reduce repetition while preserving descriptive error messages.

tasks.title: Extract parse_key_sequence to Separate Module
tasks.description: parse_key_sequence is 95 lines and could be reused elsewhere. Extract to src/key_sequence.rs module.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify parse_key_sequence works correctly in extracted module
AddRegressionTest: verify dsl.rs still uses parse_key_sequence after extraction
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing passes
tasks.impl_notes: Create src/key_sequence.rs with parse_key_sequence function. Add pub mod key_sequence; to lib.rs. Update dsl.rs to use use crate::key_sequence::parse_key_sequence;

tasks.title: Share Tokio Runtime in wait_for Variants
tasks.description: Each wait method creates its own tokio runtime which is inefficient. Investigate why separate runtimes are used and either share a runtime or document why separate ones are necessary.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify all wait_for variants still function correctly
AddUnitTest: verify shared runtime approach works for all wait methods
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing passes with shared runtime
tasks.impl_notes: Audit wait_for, wait_for_async, poll_until, poll_until_async methods. Determine if shared runtime is feasible. Document decision in code comments.

tasks.title: Consolidate Overlapping DialogTester Functionality
tasks.description: DialogTester partially overlaps with TestDsl buffer inspection methods. Identify overlapping methods and either consolidate or document distinct purposes clearly.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify overlapping methods have clear distinct purposes
AddRegressionTest: verify DialogRenderTester and TestDsl buffer methods work correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing passes
tasks.impl_notes: Compare DialogRenderTester and TestDsl buffer methods. Document the distinction or consolidate duplicates.
